law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts injuries or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euros] to one hundred [euros], or with one of those punishments alone.
  If the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].

  Art. 399. If the blows or injuries cause an illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a consequence, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The punishment is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if the blows or injuries result in an apparently incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of the use of an organ, or a serious disfigurement.
  The punishment is detention from five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or injuries are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncurableAppearingDisease: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncapacityToPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  CausesTotalLossOfUseOfAnOrgan: Person -> Bool
  CausesSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  CausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  ActedWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool
  liableArt401: Person -> Bool
  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  liableArt398: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person:
    liableArt401(p) <=> IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & CausesDeath(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt400(p) <=> (CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(p) |
                        CausesIncapacityToPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
                        CausesTotalLossOfUseOfAnOrgan(p) |
                        CausesSevereMutilation(p)) & ~CausesDeath(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt399(p) <=> CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & 
                      ~CausesDeath(p) & 
                      ~(CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(p) |
                        CausesIncapacityToPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
                        CausesTotalLossOfUseOfAnOrgan(p) |
                        CausesSevereMutilation(p)).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt398(p) <=> IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & 
                      ~CausesDeath(p) & 
                      ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
                      ~(CausesIncurableAppearingDisease(p) |
                        CausesIncapacityToPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
                        CausesTotalLossOfUseOfAnOrgan(p) |
                        CausesSevereMutilation(p)).

  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 200.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 100.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 26.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 100.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActedWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work in the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and intentionally hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and must stay at home for four weeks; she is unable to perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause any incurable illness or loss of organs.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not liable under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Jan is liable under Article 399.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Jan is 180 days.
